|cFF00FF00=== Welcome to AzerothCore! ===|r\n\n|cFFFFD700Server Features:|r\n- |cFF00FFFFPlayerBots|r - AI companions to join your adventures\n- |cFF00FF00Active Development|r - Regular updates and fixes\n- |cFFFF6600Community Driven|r - Join our Discord!\n\n|cFFFF0000Current Event:|r Double XP Weekend!\n\n|cFF888888Enjoy your stay in Azeroth!|r
